heading: Adjusted basis for determining gain or loss
label: 1011 Adjusted basis for determining gain or loss
notes: Amendments1969— redesignated existing provisions as subsec. (a) and added subsec. (b).Pub. L. 91–172

Effective Date of 1969 AmendmentAmendment by applicable with respect to sales made after , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 91–172section 201(g)(6) of Pub. L. 91–172section 170 of this titleDec. 19, 1969
amendments: Amendments1969— redesignated existing provisions as subsec. (a) and added subsec. (b).Pub. L. 91–172

children.heading: General rule
children.label: a General rule
children.text: The adjusted basis for determining the gain or loss from the sale or other disposition of property, whenever acquired, shall be the basis (determined under section 1012 or other applicable sections of this subchapter and subchapters C (relating to corporate distributions and adjustments), K (relating to partners and partnerships), and P (relating to capital gains and losses)), adjusted as provided in section 1016.

children.heading: Bargain sale to a charitable organization
children.label: b Bargain sale to a charitable organization
children.text: If a deduction is allowable under section 170 (relating to charitable contributions) by reason of a sale, then the adjusted basis for determining the gain from such sale shall be that portion of the adjusted basis which bears the same ratio to the adjusted basis as the amount realized bears to the fair market value of the property.
